dialogueChunks.intro: There has been a falling out between us and our allies, {player_name}. {quest_origin} was broken, and accusations are flying in both directions.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} was our negotiator, and they say {target_npc} deliberately caused the breach. But {target_npc} claims we were the ones at fault. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type_plural} are circling both settlements while we argue.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we do not resolve {quest_focus_the} quickly, two allies could become enemies while {quest_threat_animate_the} can pick us apart. Talk to both sides and find out what really happened.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_focus_The} {location_hint} has become a flashpoint, {player_name}. Both our settlement and our neighbors claim rights to it, and people on both sides are arming up.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} tried to calm things down, but {target_npc} brought armed workers to the site yesterday. Our people nearly came to blows. The {enemy_type_plural} have been raiding both sides, which makes everyone angrier.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need an outsider to walk between both camps and mediate before {quest_time_pressure}. Speak with {target_npc} and find common ground before {quest_threat_the} can turn into something we cannot take back.

dialogueChunks.intro: Our supplies were sabotaged, {player_name}. Deliberately. And the only people with access besides us are our allies.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} does not believe {target_npc}'s people would do this, but the evidence points their way. Someone left traces near {quest_focus_the}, and the materials involved were found {location_hint}. If this was truly sabotage by allies, everything changes.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need the truth before {quest_threat_animate_the} destroys an alliance that took years to build. Talk to witnesses on both sides and find out who really did this.
